description: Transformation library migrated to Option B (strict twin DSDs) per §6 of docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-27-method-schema-design.md. Each transformation declares twin qb:DataStructureDefinitions (inputDataStructure, outputDataStructure), input/output slot FKs against method.inputs[].name / method.outputs[].name, optional input-side slice templates, and top-level sliceKeys binding placeholders to endpoint-spec attributes. Derivations bind concepts from Option_B_Clinical.json; analyses bind output measures to AC patterns from AC_Concept_Model_v017.json (descriptive summaries bind their atomic output to DC Measure per the v017 DescriptiveSummary category note).

mapping_qb_native.inputDataStructure: qb:DataStructureDefinition for the qb:DataSet the transformation consumes.
mapping_qb_native.outputDataStructure: qb:DataStructureDefinition for the qb:DataSet the transformation produces.
mapping_qb_native.inputDataStructure.slices[]: qb:Slice templates — fixed-dimension subsets of the input qb:DataSet. Instantiated to real qb:Slices at execution time when sliceKeys bind.
mapping_qb_native.outputDataStructure.slices[]: qb:Slice templates for the output qb:DataSet. Permitted, typically empty.
mapping_qb_native.sliceKeys[]: qb:SliceKey — declares WHICH dimensions are fixed in slices using this key.

mapping_acdc_extensions.transformation as a whole: AC/DC extension. qb is silent on dataset-to-dataset derivation (W3C §8.4); we add an explicit transformation vocabulary that USES qb cube terms for input and output DSDs.
mapping_acdc_extensions.measures[].input: AC/DC extension — FK to method.inputs[].name. Required on inputDataStructure.measures[] items; rejected on outputDataStructure.measures[] items.
mapping_acdc_extensions.measures[].output: AC/DC extension — FK to method.outputs[].name. Required on outputDataStructure.measures[] items; rejected on inputDataStructure.measures[] items.
mapping_acdc_extensions.dimensions[].input: AC/DC extension on inputDataStructure.dimensions[] only — marks the dim as filling a specific method input slot (e.g. Treatment → fixed_effect). Rejected on outputDataStructure.dimensions[].
mapping_acdc_extensions.measures[].slice: AC/DC extension on inputDataStructure.measures[] only — pre-filter this measure's cube to the named slice before the method sees it.
mapping_acdc_extensions.sliceKeys[].source: AC/DC extension on qb:SliceKey — declares where the fixed-dim value comes from at run time (e.g. the endpoint's biomedicalConcept attribute).
mapping_acdc_extensions.slices[].constraints[].value as \"{place: AC/DC extension — slice TEMPLATES whose dimension values are bound at study-spec time from sliceKeys (or from transformation-local defaults like {baseline_visit}).
mapping_acdc_extensions.*.conceptCategory: AC/DC extension — references a category instead of a concrete concept; the user picks a member at study-spec time.

roleDefinitions.description: Registry of SmartPhrase roles. Each role has a human-readable label, a display order, and a contextSource that classifies whether the role is typically supplied by an endpoint spec ('endpoint') or chosen directly by the user ('manual').

transformations.label: Baseline Selection
transformations.description: Identify the baseline record per subject per parameter using M.RecordSelection configured for baseline.

measures.description: RecordSelection operates on records, not values — no value type constraint.

transformations.label: Change From Baseline
transformations.description: Calculate the arithmetic change from baseline value. Pairs every (Subject, Parameter, Visit) row with its corresponding baseline row (same Subject + Parameter, baseline visit) and subtracts.

measures.description: Current visit value of the endpoint parameter.
Baseline-flagged value of the same parameter.

slices.name: endpoint
slices.description: Same parameter as the endpoint, at the endpoint's analysis visit.

slices.name: parameter_baseline
slices.description: Same parameter as the endpoint, at the baseline visit.

transformations.label: LOCF Imputation
transformations.description: Impute missing values by carrying forward the last non-missing observation within each subject-parameter partition, ordered by analysis visit.

measures.description: LOCF operates on records — value type is pass-through.

transformations.label: Peak Concentration
transformations.description: Find the maximum concentration in a Timing-ordered PK profile per Subject/Parameter. Aggregates the Timing dim away.

transformations.label: ADAS-Cog Item Max Score
transformations.description: Max possible score for each ADAS-Cog item, used as scaling denominator when items are missing.

measures.description: 11 ADAS-Cog item scores.

transformations.label: ADAS-Cog Per-Item Missing-Capacity Contribution
transformations.description: Per-row mask: if the item value is missing (NA), output the item's max possible score; else output 0. Row-wise input to T.ADAS_MissingScaleCapacity.

measures.description: Per-row item score (raw observed value; NA when the item was not scored).
Per-item max possible score from T.ADAS_ItemMaxScore (broadcast to every row of that Parameter).

transformations.label: ADAS-Cog Missing Scale Capacity
transformations.description: Sum of max-score capacity of missing items per Subject/Visit. Equals 0 when no items are missing; equals 70 when all 11 items are missing. Used as the input to T.ADAS_ScoreableFraction.

measures.description: Per-row missing-capacity contribution from T.ADAS_MissingContribution.

transformations.label: ADAS-Cog Scoreable Fraction
transformations.description: Per-row scoring fraction = (70 - missing_capacity) / 70. Equals 1.0 when no items are missing; decreases toward 0 as more items are missing. Computed as scale * missing_capacity + offset with scale = -1/70, offset = 1.

measures.description: Total missing-item max-score capacity per Subject/Visit (output of T.ADAS_MissingScaleCapacity).

transformations.label: ADAS-Cog Sum of Available Item Scores
transformations.description: Sum of available (non-missing) ADAS-Cog item scores per Subject/Visit.

measures.description: 11 ADAS-Cog item scores (from BCs).

transformations.label: ADAS-Cog Non-Missing Item Count
transformations.description: Count of non-missing ADAS-Cog item scores per Subject/Visit. Used to determine if enough items are present for scoring.

measures.description: 11 ADAS-Cog item scores (from BCs).

transformations.label: ADAS-Cog Scoreable Check
transformations.description: Flag whether enough items are present to compute total. Requires >= 8 of 11 items.

measures.description: Count of non-missing items (from T.ADAS_NonMissingCount).

transformations.label: ADAS-Cog (11) Total Score
transformations.description: total = sum_available / scoreable_fraction, where scoreable_fraction = (70 - missing_capacity) / 70. With no missing items the fraction is 1.0 and total = sum_available. The scoreable flag (from T.ADAS_ScoreableCheck) gates rows downstream of this transformation at execution time — M.Division has no filter slot, so it isn't a method input here.

measures.description: Sum of available item scores (from T.ADAS_SumAvailableScores).
Scoreable fraction from T.ADAS_ScoreableFraction (1.0 when no items are missing).

transformations.label: Unit Conversion
transformations.description: Convert a numeric Observation (Quantity = value + unit) from its per-row source unit to a standardised target unit using the unit_conversions vocabulary. Generic — works for any numeric Observation whose BC carries a Result.Value + Result.Unit facet pair. Produces a derived Measure (Quantity).

methodConfigurations.description: Fail loudly if a factor is missing — CDISC convention prefers errors over silent NAs.

measures.description: Source Quantity (value + unit). Resolves via BC-to-OC instance mapping to SDTM --ORRES/--ORRESU.
Converted Quantity (value + target unit).

transformations.label: Derive Analysis Visit
transformations.description: Assign each observation to a scheduled analysis visit (AVISIT) via day-windows and a target-day tie-break. Default windows are for LZZT ADAS-Cog (≤1 Baseline, 2-84 Week 8, 85-140 Week 16, >140 Week 24). Consumes a pre-computed study day (SDTM --DY) relative to the randomization anchor BC.

methodConfigurations.description: BC providing the randomization anchor (Subject is Randomized, CDISC C114209). DSSTDTC is the per-subject anchor date.
Scheduled visit windows. Edit per SAP. dayMin/dayMax=null means unbounded on that side.
Tie-break: among windows matching a day, pick min |day−targetDay|, then min visitNumber.

measures.description: Study day relative to the randomization anchor (SDTM --DY).
The derived AVISIT column. Conceptually a dimension of downstream cubes; declared as the method's output measure here per §6.3 (method outputs always bind via outputDataStructure.measures[].output).

transformations.label: Change From Baseline MMRM Primary Analysis
transformations.description: Primary efficacy analysis: MMRM on change from baseline, comparing treatment groups across all visits with baseline as covariate. Visit is the repeated factor in the model, NOT a study-time slice constraint — the model fits all visits at once.

measures.description: Baseline value of the endpoint parameter.

slices.name: endpoint
slices.description: This parameter, this population, all visits (MMRM fits across visits).

slices.name: parameter_baseline
slices.description: Same parameter and population, but at the baseline visit instead.

transformations.label: Change From Baseline ANCOVA
transformations.description: ANCOVA on change from baseline at a specific visit, comparing treatment groups with baseline as covariate.

measures.description: Baseline value of the endpoint parameter.

slices.name: endpoint
slices.description: The endpoint's analysis cube: this parameter, this analysis visit, this population.

slices.name: parameter_baseline
slices.description: Same parameter and population as the endpoint, but at the baseline visit instead of the analysis visit.

transformations.label: Overall Survival Log-Rank Test
transformations.description: Compare overall survival between treatment groups using the log-rank test.

transformations.label: Count (n)
transformations.description: Count of non-missing values for a measure by treatment group and visit. Output binds to DC Measure per AC_Concept_Model_v017's DescriptiveSummary rule (descriptive outputs are atomic FHIR Quantity / Count values, not structured AC patterns).

transformations.label: Mean
transformations.description: Arithmetic mean of a measure by treatment group and visit. Output binds to DC Measure (DescriptiveSummary).

transformations.label: Standard Deviation
transformations.description: Standard deviation of a measure by treatment group and visit. Output binds to DC Measure (DescriptiveSummary).

transformations.label: Median
transformations.description: Median of a measure by treatment group and visit. Output binds to DC Measure (DescriptiveSummary).

transformations.label: Quartiles (Q1, Q3)
transformations.description: First and third quartiles of a measure by treatment group and visit. Output binds to DC Measure (DescriptiveSummary).

transformations.label: Minimum
transformations.description: Minimum value of a measure by treatment group and visit. Output binds to DC Measure (DescriptiveSummary).

transformations.label: Maximum
transformations.description: Maximum value of a measure by treatment group and visit. Output binds to DC Measure (DescriptiveSummary).

transformations.label: Responder Analysis Chi-Square
transformations.description: Compare responder proportions between treatment groups using a chi-square test.
